params.name: Le Verrier's Scripts
params.description:
On Apr 19, 1845 AD, Le Verrier began making calculations about the unknown celestial body affecting Uranus' orbit. He successfully predicted its position 4 months later.
When calculating Neptune's orbit, French astronomer Le Verrier penned this manuscript. When studying Uranus's orbit, he went deep into its abnormal motion, consulted a large amount of information, and finally successfully calculated Neptune's orbit and mass mathematically through complex calculations, as well as predicted its …
